title: LA Hillside SFR — should be rejected at intake (Baseline Hillside Ordinance not in pilot)
notes: Pilot scope excludes Hillside / BMO / HPOZ. The intake classifier should mark this as out_of_scope and skip rule evaluation. Ground truth is empty — we measure classifier accuracy separately.
plan_text:
PROJECT DATA - 8800 MULHOLLAND DR
ZONING: RE40-1H (Hillside Overlay)
Baseline Hillside Ordinance applies
Responsible Slope Band: per LAMC 12.21.C.10
Lot is on a designated hillside per ZIMAS
Proposed: new single-family residence 4,200 sf
Occupancy Group: R-3
Construction Type: V-B
Number of stories: 3 (terraced into slope)
Height envelope per BHO
Encroachment plane analysis sheet A-0.5
